providers.name: Point Blank Music School
providers.notes: DJ Mag's 'Best Music Production and DJ School' — runs a dedicated Turntablism & Advanced DJing workshop with DJ Shorty, Pioneer/Technics kit.

providers.name: London Sound Academy (LSA)
providers.notes: 260+ 5-star reviews; bespoke 4x2hr turntablism course with scratch specialist DJ Allmoe — strongest match for Sid Wilson-style scratch chops.

providers.name: SubBass Academy of Electronic Music
providers.notes: Only UK school with individual DJ practice booths; class cap of 6 keeps attention high — great for a family member who wants privacy.

providers.name: BAD Studios (Become A DJ)
providers.notes: Pay-as-you-go 1-to-1s, open 9am-11pm seven days — easiest West London pull from Chalfont St Giles.

providers.name: JW DJ Academy
providers.notes: Dedicated turntablist pathway for students already at intermediate level; urban-genre focus pairs well with Sid Wilson's hip-hop-rooted scratch style.

providers.name: On The Rise DJ Academy
providers.notes: Scratch course led by Jon1st (2013 Online World DMC Champion) — elite-level turntablism that aligns with Slipknot/Sid Wilson territory.

providers.name: School of Scratch (Emma Short-E)
providers.notes: Founded 2014 by world-touring scratch DJ Emma Short-E; laser-focused on the scratch craft itself — the closest direct pipeline to Sid Wilson-calibre turntablism.

providers.name: London AMP
providers.notes: Rounded DJ + production curriculum for students who also want to make beats alongside mixing.

providers.name: The Knowledge Academy — Watford
providers.notes: Closest classroom option to Welders House — one-day immersive DJ training, good for a fast taster before committing to a London academy.

providers.name: The Knowledge Academy — Reading
providers.notes: Same 1-day curriculum as the Watford branch; useful alternative if Reading is the easier drive on the day.

providers.name: Crossfader (online, UK-based)
providers.notes: 24/7 online platform with mobile app — perfect low-friction supplement between in-person sessions, ideal for tour schedules.

providers.name: First Tutors: Music (High Wycombe)
specialties: beginner DJ/production tutors bookable in HP postcodes
providers.notes: Marketplace for local private music tutors in Beaconsfield/Amersham/Marlow — useful for discreet at-home DJ tuition within 10 miles of Welders House.
